nodes.title: VIDEO CONFIG / INPUT
widgets_values:
Set output resolution and length for parts here.

If you want to use an existing image simply bypass Z-I-T and connect load image node into Encode.

While using Z-I-T enable sage attention and torch compile for extra speed if you have the right environment.

nodes.title: DATA BUS
widgets_values: Added DataBus to make connections simpler. Make sure every I2V part has its part_bus connected to previous node's output.

nodes.title: MERGE SYSTEM + UPSCALE + INTERPOLATION
widgets_values:
Each part has a save node inside starting from the second part. Each part will fix the transition and save the previous one into temp folder with a loseless quality.

Final part will be merged in Final Merge then all videos will be merged then saved as one single mp4 video in outputs folder.

You can manually open temp files using a software like VLC and/or merge them manually if the generation somehow fails.

You can also enable upscale and interpolation nodes inside this subgraph.

nodes.title: EXTEND FURTHER
widgets_values:
To extend videos further make sure you have copy/pasted the last Extend node and connected previous part's output into part_bus.
Dont forget to connect last part_bus to Final Merge subgraph.

nodes.title: SEED CONTROL / SAVE PREVIEW / PART SPECIFIC LORA
widgets_values:
You can use fixed seed to regenerate some parts and previous parts wont be regenerated.

You can preview saved outputs inside each part. Each part only gets saved when next one is finished.

You can set part specific loras inside each part. Lora's do degrade the quality compared to almost no loss without them.

nodes.title: WAN I2V A14B Model + SVI / Lightx2v / Common Lora Loader
widgets_values:
Set your models here. Enable sage attention and torch compile for extra speed if you have the right environment.

GGUF models perform better and cause less ghosting / cut issues. If you still want to load non-gguf models set them inside the WAN2.2-I2V Loader subgrahp.

Reduce high_lightx2v_weight (default is 1) if you get weird artifacts/ribbons/colors in the video.

nodes.title: STEPS / CFG
widgets_values:
Control steps for each ksampling stage here as in how many steps you want each sampling phase to process.

No lightx2v lora step will be skipped if you set no lightx2v step count to 0.

If you dont want to use lightx2v lora's at all or run it on a higher cfg; bypass the lora loader in the model loader subgraph and set high-low-cfg to a higher number like 3.5 or 4.

nodes.title: CUSTOM LORA
widgets_values:
Set your custom lora's in common lora nodes.

These will be applied to all parts.

nodes.title: SVI LORAS
widgets_values: Make sure to download the ones from kijai's

nodes.title: WAN2.2 IMAGE TO VIDEO MODELS
widgets_values:
Load Wan2.2 "I2V" A14B models here.

GGUF works better as fp8 scaled had some ghosting issues

nodes.title: LIGHTX2V LORAS
widgets_values: Make sure to download the ones linked in civit page

nodes.title: CLIP MODEL
widgets_values: Switch to default clip if you dont have gguf

nodes.title: VAE
widgets_values: fp32 worked better for me in the long run but default one works too

nodes.title: CUSTOM LORA
widgets_values: Set your custom lora's for ZIT model here.
an astronaut, floating in space, close up uppor body, earth is in the background, cinematic

These will only be applied to this part.

nodes.title: INTERPOLATION
widgets_values:
Enable RIFE VFI node if you want to interpolate the generated video.

Change multiplier value to determine number of frames generated. FPS is updated automatically.

x2 is 30fps
x4 is 60fps

INCREASES GENERATION TIME SIGNIFICANTLY

nodes.title: UPSCALE
widgets_values:
Enable upscale subgraph to upscale generated videos using an upscale model. You can scale down the final output using post scale down.

INCREASES GENERATION TIME SIGNIFICANTLY

Or you can just connect input and output of upscale image by for simple resize. May not increase quality.

nodes.title: MANUAL MERGE
widgets_values: Disable this node if you want to manually merge part videos using a 3rd party sofware, it may throw an error but you will have part files in temp folder.

nodes.title: PART SPECIFIC CUSTOM LORA
widgets_values:
Set your part specific custom lora's in these lora nodes.

These will only be applied to this part.
